title: 方程式のオーサーシップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the final day to make adjustments for the
autumn Tenno Sho. Once we get through this, the
battle with Narita Brian at the Arima Kinen
awaits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide tells me that she's going to get
some rest and heads home, but I stay behind and
continue to gather intel on Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more I learn about her, the more anxious I
get. My hard work is cutting into my sleep time,
and I think I might be reaching my limits...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken by surprise when Biwa Hayahide returns
and starts scolding me for working under such
fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With tears in her eyes, she explains that success
will be impossible if one of us is too exhausted to
go on—we have to support each other. Humbled
by her words, I agree to get more rest.
